parquet_lost_update.demonstrates: Raw Parquet: no conflict detection → atomic rename last-writer-wins → silent data loss. os.replace() succeeds unconditionally; the second rename destroys the first writer's 100K rows.

delta_conflict.writer_a_exception: : io.delta.exceptions.ConcurrentAppendException: [DELTA_CONCURRENT_APPEND.WITHOUT_HINT] Transaction conflict detected. a concurrent MERGE added data to table delta.`file:/tmp/acid_benchmark_ahgebc0a/d
delta_conflict.rejected_exception: : io.delta.exceptions.ConcurrentAppendException: [DELTA_CONCURRENT_APPEND.WITHOUT_HINT] Transaction conflict detected. a concurrent MERGE added data to table delta.`file:/tmp/acid_benchmark_ahgebc0a/d
delta_conflict.demonstrates: Delta Lake OCC: concurrent merge() on same rows → ConcurrentAppendException; Writer A rejected, data integrity preserved

delta_snapshot.time_travel_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delta.`<path>` VERSION AS OF 0
delta_snapshot.demonstrates: Delta MVCC: VERSION AS OF 0 returns exact pre-append snapshot (10,000 rows vs 15,000 current); concurrent readers see consistent data regardless of in-flight writes

proof.exception_message: : io.delta.exceptions.ConcurrentAppendException: [DELTA_CONCURRENT_APPEND.WITHOUT_HINT] Transaction conflict detected. a concurrent MERGE added data to table delta.`file:/tmp/acid_benchmark_ahgebc0a/d
proof.conclusion: All three proofs confirmed: 500,000 Parquet rows silently lost; Delta OCC raised ConcurrentAppendException; MVCC snapshot isolation verified
proof.maps_to: CMU 15-721 Lectures 13-15: OCC / MVCC / Concurrency Control

validation.lecture: CMU 15-721 Lectures 13-15: OCC / MVCC / Concurrency Control
validation.concept: OCC detects write-write conflicts at commit time; MVCC enables consistent snapshot reads
validation.proof: Parquet: 500,000 rows silently lost (last-writer-wins) | Delta OCC: ConcurrentAppendException raised for Writer A | Delta MVCC: VERSION AS OF 0 → 10,000 rows (vs 15,000 current)
validation.validates: ACID lakehouse (Delta) vs raw file format (Parquet) — integrity is not free
validation.interpretation: Raw Parquet has NO conflict detection: Writer B silently overwrote Writer A, losing 500,000 rows with zero error. Delta Lake's OCC caught the same conflict at commit time (: io.delta.exceptions.ConcurrentAppendException: [DELTA_CONCURRENT_APPEND.WITHOUT_HINT] Transaction conflict detected. a concurrent MERGE added data to table delta.`file:/tmp/acid_benchmark_ahgebc0a/d), preventing data corruption. The MVCC time-travel read proved snapshot isolation — VERSION AS OF 0 returned exactly 10,000 rows despite 15,000 rows in the current version.
